title: St John Ambulance F12000 Tweezers - 9cm
features: Keep at hand in a first aid kit
description: From the manufacturer St John volunteers are supporting ambulance services, hospitals and communities in this Emergency Pandemic situation We are St John Ambulance, the charity for health and first aid in your community. We offer over 2,000 first aid and health and safety products, so you have everything you need to keep your workplace, home or community safe. Defibrillators, accessories and training models. First aid kits and First aid supplies and consumables. Hand sanitizers and wipes Use hand sanitisers and wipes to improve infection prevention and control. We have range of hand sanitisers and wipes, available in alcohol-based or alcohol-free options. Type 1 Disposable Surgical Face Masks Pack of 50 Type 1 face masks 3-ply disposable surgical face mask Soft and comfortable fitting with ear loops and easy breathability Conforms to EN 14683:2019 Bacterial filtration efficiency (BFE) >95% Type IIR Disposable Surgical Face Masks Pack of 50 Type IIR face masks 3-ply disposable surgical face mask, soft and comfortable fitting with ear loops and easy breathability Conforms to EN 14683:2019 Bacterial filtration efficiency (BFE) >98% Splash resistant. Basic Workplace First Aid Kit Bundle First aid kit bundle containing basic first aid for the workplace Ensures the wellbeing of employees Meets legal and health and safety requirements. Hand sanitizers and wipes Surgical Face Masks Type IIR Disposable Surgical Face Masks Basic Workplace First Aid Kit Bundle First aid supplies and consumables Disposable first aid gloves Disposable first aid gloves are a vital part of a first aid kit to reduce the risk of infection and cross-contamination. We have range of nitrile and vinyl gloves, available in small, medium and large sizes. We do not sell latex gloves due to the risk of allergic reactions. First aid dressings, pads and tape Restock your first aid kit with our range of first aid dressings, pads, bandages and tape. This range includes burn dressings, adhesive dressing pads, bandages for fingers, thumbs and toes, crepe and triangular bandages, tape, and more. First aid kits First aid kits are an important item for any workplace, home, or vehicle. All our workplace first aid kits conform with British Standard BS 8599-1:2019, and our motor vehicle first aid kits conform with BS 8599-2:2014. We have range of workplace, burns, car, sports and home first aid kits in small, medium and large sizes. Defibrillators, accessories and training models Defibrillators are easy to use, with clear step-by-step instructions. We encourage all workplaces, schools, and public buildings to have a defibrillator on site. We have range of semi and fully automatic defibrillators for schools and workplaces, with additional accessories to help you install and maintain your defibrillator. Our Range of Life Saving Defibrillators iPAD SP1 AED Fully Automatic Defibrillator Fully-automatic defibrillator (AED) for treatment of Sudden Cardiac Arrest (SCA) Clear illuminated images on the unit and calm voice prompts will help guide lay people and fully trained responders alike Ambient noise detector adjusts volume accordingly Compact and easy to carry Simple switch from adult to child mode Zoll AED 3 Fully Automatic Defibrillator Fully automatic defibrillator (AED) for treatment of Sudden Cardiac Arrest (SCA) Can be used upright or flat for best visibility Universal pad design means pads are suitable for adults and children Equipped with WiFi connectivity to link with PlusTrac AED programme management system to automatically update you with the readiness status of your device Philips HeartStart HS1 Semi-Automatic Defibrillator Semi-automatic defibrillator (AED) for treatment of Sudden Cardiac Arrest (SCA) Simple to operate by emergency first aiders and those with minimal first aid training Calming voice instructions guide the user through what to do Self tests and always ready for use Pre-connected SMART Pads save vital time Defibtech Lifeline AED Fully Automatic Defibrillator with 5 Year Battery Pack Fully automatic defibrillator (AED) for treatment of Sudden Cardiac Arrest (SCA) Includes 5 year battery For use by whoever is first on the scene of a cardiac arrest - passer by or trained first aider Lightweight with carry handle Rugged bright yellow bumper design protects against dust, water and being dropped Defibrillators, accessories and training models. First aid kits and First aid supplies and consumables. St John Ambulance - first aid supplies and health and safety equipment. Our aim is to provide the best value for our customers while performing to our high standards, we have a wide range of high quality own branded first aid products, that our own first aid and medical services use when treating the public. What makes St John Ambulance supplies truly unique is that all our surplus profits go straight back into the charitable output of St John Ambulance. We are the charity that steps forward in the moments that matter, to save lives and support communities. We fund the work of our amazing volunteers through fundraising, our first aid products, workplace training, event and ambulance services.
